case_title: ALAN WILLIAM SHINDEL ET AL VS. TRUCK FORCE LLC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-16-2016 - JUDGMENT.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY TRUCK FORCE LLC ON MAY-04-2016 - DENIED AS DEFENDANT HAS WITHDRAWN THE MOTION TO VACATE. PLAINTIFF ALAN WILLIAM SHINDEL WAS PRESENT. TRUCK FORCE LLC WAS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JACK C. HENNING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-26-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TRUCK FORCE LLC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHINDEL, ALAN WILLIAM ROWEN, TAMI SERENE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRUCK FORCE LLC $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,045.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT TRUCK FORCE LLC HEARING SET FOR MAY-04-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY SHINDEL, ALAN WILLIAM ROWEN, TAMI SERENE AS TO DEFENDANT TRUCK FORCE LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-16-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT TRUCK FORCE LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-16-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEBRUARY-16-2016 BY HON. DONALD S. MITCHELL. THE PLAINTIFF APPEARS. NO APPEARANCE BY OR FOR DEFENDANT. THE MATTER IS HEARD AND IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION BY THE COURT. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK M.L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (DEPT. 506).
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT TRUCK FORCE LLC
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (LANCE LITTLE, SAFETY DIRECTOR FOR TRUCK FORCE LLC) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHINDEL, ALAN WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT TRUCK FORCE LLC
